commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh This is the land that yet remains: all the borders of the Philistines, and all that of the Geshurites, Galilee. As Josue had been making such conquests in that part lately, some would translate Geliloth, "the confines "of the Philistines, in which sense it seems to be taken, chap. (Calmet) Bonfrere suspects that St. Jerome wrote Galila. Gessuri, either near Mount Hermon, (Menochius) or bordering upon Arabia, 1 Kings xv. , and xxvii.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
